summary.shape_sentence: Early RTH base and squeeze, then a strong upside trend leg into midday, a moderate pullback, and a close in the upper portion of the session after failing to hold the absolute high.

goat.note: Late-morning upside expansion from the 24,900 reclaim into the 25,280+ supply band was the standout move of the RTH session.

red_circles.behavior: Mostly appeared at local exhaustion highs during the midday and late-session pushes, marking fade zones after extension.

green_circles.behavior: Clustered near pullback lows and reclaim points, especially around the 10:00 launch area and the afternoon higher-low hold.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply stacked around 25,200, 25,260, and 25,280-25,305; lower supply levels were broken, while the top band capped the day.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand showed around 24,820-24,900 and again around 25,140-25,180; both zones were defended and helped sustain the bullish session.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening balance was resolving upward; price was reclaiming around 24,900 and beginning the session's strongest upside drive.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was pressing the upper supply band near 25,280-25,300, with momentum still up but susceptible to rejection.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon pullback was stabilizing around 25,160-25,180, setting up a higher-low rebound attempt.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session closed at 25,213, green on the day and above the afternoon pullback lows, but below the midday high.

takeaway: Bullish RTH trend day that opened rotationally, accepted above early demand, and repriced higher into noon before settling into an afternoon pullback-and-hold.
